summary: Add the durable runtime control plane behind SeekTalent workflow execution.
rationale: The runtime-control plane introduces a new package, SQLite store, settings, source-boundary checks, and integration wiring. The change intentionally crosses the default one-layer PR guardrail but is split across the Graphite stack and covered by focused runtime-control and full-suite verification.
dependency_rationale: The runtime-control package must be registered with the uv build backend so it is included in built distributions.
deletion_targets: ad hoc runtime-control state stored only in Workbench/session memory
synthetic approved-requirement lineage for next-round amendments
line_count_rationale: config.py and the initial runtime control store module are already oversized from earlier control-plane work, so this goal records both as exempt while avoiding unrelated line-count churn.
risks: The SQLite store is intentionally broad for the first durable runtime-control slice, so future changes should avoid growing it without splitting read/write concerns.
Runtime-control boundary checks must continue to prevent service modules from importing concrete providers or WorkflowRuntime directly.
Next-round requirement amendments must preserve approved-revision lineage instead of reusing an older draft id.
